title: An upper panel
abstract: The present invention relates to an upper panel (1 ) used particularly in washing machines and dishwashers, with increased humidity and water resistance, and improved heat and sound insulation, comprising at least one inner layer (2) and at least one outer layer (3).
claims: Claims ( 7 ) An upper panel (1) used particularly in washing machines and dishwashers, characterized by -	at least one inner layer (2) comprising per 100 units of PVC, stabilizer in the range of 0.5-6 units, blowing agent in the range of 3-35 units, and filling material in the range of 1-40 units, and -	at least one outer layer (3) made of plastics. An upper panel (1) according to claim 1, comprising an outer layer (3) which is any of the state of the art plastics such as ABS (acrylonitrile-butadiene-styrene) or PMMA (Poly(methyl methacrylate)), or those which may be developed in the future, or a combination thereof. An upper panel (1) according to claim 1, produced by the method of co-extrusion of the inner layer (2) and the outer layer (3). An upper panel (1) according to claim 1, comprising an inner layer (2) and an outer layer (3) whose compound temperature is between 140 and 185 Â°C. An upper panel (1) according to claim 1, comprising an outer layer (3) which is wrapped around the inner layer (2) in the form of a frame, after extrusion of said inner layer (2). An upper panel (1) according to claim 5, comprising an inner layer (2) whose upper portion is coated with a plastic material such as PVC or ABS. An upper panel (1) according to claim 6, wherein the outer layer (3) and the upper portion of the inner layer (2) are produced by the method of co-injection.
